long_description:
NRE were alerted via oculus regarding dark fibre flap between PAR04 <---> PAR05.
Investigation in progress.
https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19797
close_notes: The dark fibre flapped and is now stable. Vendor was contacted for RFO.
